name: great-publishers
description: Eight publisher/editor/designer personas (Chip Kidd, Tina Brown, Maxwell Perkins, Jann Wenner, Bob Silvers, Diana Vreeland, Bennett Cerf, George Lois) plus four operational skills that consume artifacts from great-authors and great-filmmakers and ship them as book sites, trailers, blog posts, and cover briefs. Fourth in the Great Minds constellation.
